tool_args.hypothesis: approve is public and missing owner/operator checks, allowing any caller to set approval for any token ID (enables unauthorized transfers).

steps.tool_result: {"ok": true, "target_function": "approve", "hypothesis": "approve is public and missing owner/operator checks, allowing any caller to set approval for any token ID (enables unauthorized transfers)."}

tool_args.exploit_logic: Call approve(tokenId) from an attacker account for a token owned by victim; then attacker calls transferFrom(victim, attacker, tokenId) and succeeds, proving approval lacked access control.
